readings.summary: Be humble, find favor with God.

readings.citation:
Ps 68:4-5, 6-7, 10-11, R. see v.11b
God, in your goodness,
you have made a home for the poor.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 68:4-5, 6-7, 10-11, R. see v.11b
God, in your goodness,
you have made a home for the poor.

readings.summary: We are drawn to the heavenly Jerusalem.

Take my yoke upon you, says the Lord,
and learn from me, for I am meek and humble of heart.

antiphons.text:
Have mercy on me, O Lord, for I cry to you all the day long.
O Lord, you are good and forgiving,
full of mercy to all who call to you.

How great is the goodness, Lord,
that you keep for those who fear you.

Blessed are the peacemakers,
for they shall be called children of God.
Blessed are they who are persecuted
for the sake of righteousness,
for theirs is the Kingdom of Heaven.
